articles.title: Vera Arrives: NVIDIA’s First CPU Built for Agents Lands at Top AI Labs

NVIDIA Vice President of Hyperscale and High-Performance Computing Ian Buck hand-delivered them.

articles.title: Prompting Amazon Nova 2 for content moderation
articles.snippet: In this post, you learn how to prompt Amazon Nova 2 Lite for content moderation using structured and free-form approaches, grounded in the MLCommons AILuminate Assessment Standard. The prompting techniques use the AILuminate taxonomy as an example, but they work equally well with your own custom moderation policy.
